google.text: TRUCKLOAD RATE CONFIRMATION Lightning Logistics Group 202 Crystal Grove Blvd LUTZ, FL 33548 Carrier Name: AUTHORITY CARRIERS Ready Date: 6/21/2025 Date Needed: 6/22/2025 Service Level: Normal Shipper Information: Name: Address: B&W Quality Growers - Elora, TN Packing 2950 Winchester Highway Pickup instructions: Elora, TN 37328 LIGHTNING LOGISTICS GROUP Load #: 123638120 Customer PO: 25-19297 Shipper Ref: Trailer Type/Size: 53 ft Reefer / Full Trailer Temperature: 35 Contact: Phone: Ready Time: Appointment Time: 8:00 AM - 12:00 PM Consignee Information: Name: Address: B&W Quality Growers - Vero Beach, FL 9095 17th Pl. Contact: Phone: Vero Beach, FL 32966 Close Time: 7:00 AM 12:00 PM - Delivery instructions: Appointment Time: Handling Units 1 Package Type Pallet Pieces 1 HAZMAT List of Items Fresh Produce SPECIAL INSTRUCTIONS Charges may apply for late pick-ups and deliveries. It is the driver's responsibility to ensure that the load is safe, secure and legal for transport. - Driver is required to accept tracking via Trucker Tools Mobile App or ELD. Rate: TOTAL: Total Weight 38,000 USD $2,400.00 USD $2,400.00 -Driver is required to set location settings to ALWAYS for the Trucker Tools Mobile App. - A failure to accept tracking and continue tracking through the duration of the load will result in a $100 fine for the first occurrence and any subsequent occurrences will result in jeopardizing possible future loads with Lightning Logistics. - All trailers must be clean, empty and odor free to meet all regulations per the FSMA Act. - Reefer units must be clean with walls free of holes. Chutes must be free of tears, rips and in good working order. - Any deviation from dispatch instructions must be called in immediately. - All orders SHORT/DAMAGED/REFUSED must be reported at time of Pickup/Delivery. - Failure to report will result in additional charges. DETENTION POLICY - Driver to notify appropriate Lightning staff 2 hours after arrival and every hour thereafter until (un) loading is complete. - Driver will be paid detention per hour after 3 full hours. ABSOLUTELY NO DOUBLE BROKERING: It is agreed that any re-brokering of this load will result in non-payment to carrier, in addition to any other penalties applicable by contract or by the law. INVOICING INSTRUCTIONS - Settlements paid within 30 days from the date we receive your invoice. All invoices must include ALL SIGNED DELIVERY RECEIPTS, BOLS and ORDER & LOAD numbers. - All documents are to be uploaded via Trucker Tools Mobile App by the driver after delivery, scanned and e-mailed to invoices@lightning3pl.com. Carrier Signature: MC#: Phone: (772) 446-1188 | Fax: Please sign and return via fax or email to Driver Name: Driver Phone#: Please call (772) 446-1188 immediately with any questions, concerns, or problems! Send Invoicing to: Lightning Logistics Group | 202 Crystal Grove Blvd | LUTZ, FL 33548
